title: WATER-CLIENTS-FOUNDATION
scope: USER-DIRECTED water domain, phase 9 of 12 — FOUNDATION of the 4-phase water-clients epic (94 foundation → 95 onboarding → 96 dashboard [reuses Phase-93 Components/Water/* + WaterAccountService] → 97 billing). The borehole-supplies-neighbours scenario: a landlord supplies water to non-tenant external parties billed at a DIFFERENT rate. Identity model SETTLED: water supply is a RELATIONSHIP (WaterConnection = analogue of Lease, the 'water line') belonging to a User of any role + landlord, carrying a landlord-defined identifier + billing_mode + client rate, linking to a Meter, optionally a unit; a water-only person is a User with NEW single-value role water_client; dashboards render by CAPABILITY (has_water_connection). Phase 94 = the MODEL + role plumbing + landlord setup/management surface ONLY (NOT onboarding[95]/dashboard[96]/billing[97]). Scout facts: mirror Lease (model/migration/factory/policy, TenantScope+SoftDeletes, scopeActive). water_meters.unit_id is ALREADY nullable (the Phase-86 migration comment explicitly anticipated 'a free-standing water line — Phase 94 water clients'). Role set enumerated in User helpers + RegisteredUserController validation 'in:landlord,caretaker,tenant' (Phase46 surface test asserts this exact string — update together) + TenantScope bootTenantScope role branches + AdminController role list. Water hub tab = mirror Phase-91/92 landlord-only tabs. WizardSteps scaffold (Components/Wizard/WizardSteps.vue: currentStep/totalSteps/steps[]/label) for the guided setup. supplies_water_clients + water_client_rate go on PaymentConfiguration (managed via the clients tab, NOT WaterSettingsForm — avoid a divergent settings surface per the WATER-SETTINGS-canonical memory).

findings.title: WaterConnection model (the water line; analogue of Lease)
findings.evidence: There is no entity for a water supply relationship to a non-tenant client.
findings.remediation: Migration water_connections (landlord_id, user_id nullable [the client account, linked at onboarding 95], unit_id nullable, meter_id nullable, identifier [landlord-defined water-line code], client_name nullable, billing_mode [metered|flat_rate], client_rate decimal nullable, status [active|inactive], connected_at date nullable, notes, timestamps, softDeletes; indexes landlord_id+status, user_id). WaterConnection model (TenantScope+SoftDeletes+HasFactory+Auditable; belongsTo landlord/client/unit/meter; scopeActive) + factory + WaterConnectionPolicy (landlord owns; caretaker landlord_id; future client self) + register. Phase94 test: a connection is landlord-scoped; policy gates correctly.

findings.title: supplies_water_clients + client rate config
findings.evidence: No landlord-level opt-in for supplying external water clients, nor a distinct client rate.
findings.remediation: Migration payment_configurations.supplies_water_clients (boolean default false) + water_client_rate (decimal nullable). PaymentConfiguration fillable/casts. Managed via the clients-tab setup (NOT WaterSettingsForm — keep one clients-config home). Phase94 test: schema present; setup persists the flag + rate.

findings.title: water_client User role plumbing
findings.evidence: The system knows only super_admin/landlord/caretaker/tenant; a water-only account type has no role.
findings.remediation: User::isWaterClient(); RegisteredUserController validation 'in:landlord,caretaker,tenant,water_client' (+ update the Phase46 surface test assertion together); TenantScope bootTenantScope water_client → where landlord_id = user.landlord_id (scoped to supplier, like tenant); AdminController role list += water_client. (Defer MessageThread/OnboardingFunnel until 95 — no water_client users exist yet.) Phase94 test: isWaterClient() works; a water_client user is landlord-scoped; registration accepts the role.

findings.title: Landlord water-clients tab: setup wizard + connections management
findings.evidence: A landlord has no way to declare they supply external clients, identify water lines, or set a client rate.
findings.remediation: Landlord-only 'clients' tab (WaterHubController getClientsData caretaker-bounced + Hub.vue ClientsTab async, UserGroupIcon, canSettings-gated). ClientsTab.vue: when supplies_water_clients is off, a guided setup wizard (Components/Wizard/WizardSteps) to declare supply + set the default client rate + the water-line identifier scheme; when on, the connections management surface (list + create/edit/delete a water line: identifier, client name, meter, billing_mode, rate, status). WaterConnectionController setup (enable + default rate) + store/update/destroy (landlord-only, owns) + routes (water.module + role:landlord). i18n en/sw/ar. nav-audit clean. Phase94 test: caretaker cannot open clients; landlord enables + creates a connection; cross-landlord meter/connection rejected.

findings.title: Phase 94 behavioral + surface tests
findings.evidence: The model + role + setup + CRUD + gate need regression guards.
findings.remediation: Phase94WaterClientsFoundationTest (connection CRUD landlord-only + cross-landlord rejected; setup enables flag+rate; isWaterClient + registration validation + scope; clients tab caretaker-gated) + Phase94 surface (schema, model/policy registered, role validation string, routes, lang parity). Existing water + auth + onboarding suites stay green.

findings.title: Runbook + closeout + memory + multi-reviewer pass
findings.evidence: The new account type needs operator docs + per-phase review.
findings.remediation: docs/runbooks/water.md water-clients section (the identity model, WaterConnection, the opt-in, what's deferred to 95-97). Multi-reviewer read-only pass. Memory: phase94 plan + forward/pending-path. Name next = Phase 95 [WATER-CLIENT-ONBOARDING].

closeout.summary: Foundation of the water-clients epic (94 foundation → 95 onboarding → 96 dashboard → 97 billing). MODEL: WaterConnection (water_connections — the "water line", analogue of Lease: landlord_id, user_id [client account, null until onboarded], unit_id/meter_id both nullable [a client line can be unit-less], identifier, client_name, billing_mode metered/flat_rate, client_rate, status, connected_at; TenantScope+SoftDeletes+Auditable; scopeActive) + factory + WaterConnectionPolicy (landlord owns; caretaker landlord_id; water_client self) + registered; payment_configurations.supplies_water_clients + water_client_rate. ROLE: User::isWaterClient() + RegisteredUserController validation in:...,water_client + TenantScope water_client→landlord_id branch + AdminController role list. SURFACE: landlord-only Clients tab (WaterHubController getClientsData caretaker-bounced + Hub.vue ClientsTab UserGroupIcon canSettings-gated) — ClientsTab.vue setup wizard (WizardSteps: declare supply + default client rate) until opted in, then connection management (create/edit/delete a water line: identifier, client name, meter, billing_mode, rate, status); WaterConnectionController setup + store/update/destroy (landlord-only, FK-scoped) + routes; i18n NET-NEW water.clients.* en/sw/ar. CI surface + behavioral tests + runbook. NOT in scope (deferred 95-97): client onboarding/dashboard/billing.
closeout.tests: Phase-94 tests: WaterClientsFoundation 10 + Surface 7 (17 / 63 assertions). Water + Auth + Onboarding regression 365 / 1055 green. Pint/build/eslint(custom rules 0)/nav-audit clean. Lang parity water 237.
closeout.review: Multi-reviewer read-only pass (CodeRabbit + pr-review-toolkit code-reviewer + silent-failure-hunter). Fixed in 94: CRITICAL self-registration accepted water_client but onboarding_sessions.role is a hard ENUM [landlord,caretaker,tenant] -> 500 mid-registration -> reverted RegisteredUserController to NOT expose water_client (water clients are landlord-provisioned in 95, not self-registered); MEDIUM setup() now uses getOrCreateForLandlord()->update() so opting in never leaves a half-seeded PaymentConfiguration; store/update use $request->validated() (convention) instead of input()/only(); connected_at gains before_or_equal:today. DEFERRED to 95 (handle before the first water_client logs in): DashboardController match default=>abort(403) + AuthenticatedLayout empty nav + OnboardingFlow::forRole throw + getEffectiveCurrency/getNavBadges fall-through + enforce non-null landlord_id at water_client creation (TenantScope stamps null otherwise). DEFERRED to 97: the biller must REFUSE/flag a connection whose effective rate (client_rate ?? water_client_rate) is null — never coerce 0 — and a metered connection with no meter_id.
closeout.constraints_preserved: Identity model honored: WaterConnection is a relationship (not a role); water_client role only plumbed (users created in 95); dashboards by capability. Clients tab + connection CRUD landlord-only (caretaker bounced + route role:landlord + policy ownership). meter_id/unit_id FKs scoped to the acting landlord. supplies_water_clients managed only on the clients tab (not the shared WaterSettingsForm — avoids a divergent settings surface). water_client scoped to supplier landlord_id like a tenant. Money decimal:2.
